understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level to win, progressing through BP35 levels until the game is completed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is only horizontal (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT); after each move gravity pulls you in the active direction (DOWN toward smaller y, UP toward larger y) until landing. CLICK removes breakable `x` blocks to open paths. Spikes `u`/`v` instantly end the run; UNDO reverts the last action. Each attempt has 50 steps and 2 attempts per level.
